name: Summer Beach Tiles — Cozy Pixel Art Tile Set
description:
Lay the foundation for your beach world! A complete pixel art tileset for your RPG, simulation, or cozy game.

✨ **Highlights:**
• 5 seamless tiles (32×32)
• Sandy shores, crystal water, and wooden boardwalks
• 100% tileable edges for seamless map building
• PICO-8 inspired 24-color palette
• Compatible with RPG Maker, GameMaker, Unity, Godot, and Tiled

**Includes:**
• 5 unique tiles (32×32)
• Full sprite sheet strip
• CC0 license — use in any project, personal or commercial

**Quality Score:** 8.1/10 — Curator Approved with Distinction
